Mol* viewer build vendored from the npm "molstar" package.
Version: 5.10.1
Files: molstar.js, molstar.css (from build/viewer/)
Source maps (*.map) intentionally omitted to keep the repo lean.
Re-vendor: npm pack molstar && tar xzf molstar-*.tgz && cp package/build/viewer/molstar.{js,css} here

LOCAL PATCH: molstar.js has its lipid-name set extended with CHARMM membrane
residues Mol* doesn't ship (CHL1/cholesterol, PSM/sphingomyelin, SOPE/SOPS, ...)
so they classify and render as lipids. This edit is overwritten when re-vendoring
above — re-apply it with:  python tools/patch_molstar_lipids.py
(idempotent; see that script for the full list).
